title: [RSO_Call for Proposals_July 17, 2024] The Jiangsu Planning Office of Philosophy and Social Science – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
[RSO_Call for Proposals_July 17, 2024] The Jiangsu Planning Office of Philosophy and Social Science
The Jiangsu Planning Office of Philosophy and Social Science is calling for proposals in Chinese.
You could visit their official website for more information: 2024年江苏省社科基金年度项目申报公告.
Budget Total:
Key Programs: 80,000 RMB per project
General Programs: 50,000 RMB per project
Young Scientist Programs: 50,000 RMB per project
Priority Areas (partial):
Research on the Trends of Interdisciplinary Integration and Development in Humanities and Social Sciences
Research on the Effective Pathways for Connecting Green Finance and Transition Finance in Jiangsu
Research on Ecological Protection and Collaborative Governance in the Yangtze River Basin in Jiangsu
More topics in Art Studies, Sports Science, Education, Journalism and Communication, Linguistics, History (please refer to the attachment for the complete list of research topics)
Project Period and Requirements for Research Results:
Basic theoretical research tasks are generally completed within 3 years, with the final outcomes being either a monograph or a series of papers. Monographs must pass evaluation before publication; unauthorized publications will be considered a breach of the funding agreement, resulting in its termination.
Applied policy research, depending on the urgency and timeliness of the research problem, should typically be completed within two years. The outcome is a research report, with the core viewpoints or important policy recommendations usually required to be published in the Provincial Party Committee’s Propaganda Department’s “Propaganda Work Bulletin · Social Science Fund Special Issue” (省委宣传部《宣传工作动态·社科基金成果专刊》) before the project can be considered complete.
Eligibility and Quota Requirements:
Key project applicants must hold a professional or technical title of associate senior level or higher (副高级以上专业技术职称).
For youth projects, male applicants must be under 35 years old (born after August 2, 1989), and female applicants must be under 40 years old (born after August 2, 1984).
Applicants for a project can only apply for one provincial social science fund annual project and cannot participate as a team member in other provincial social science fund annual project applications.
Team members can participate in a maximum of two provincial social science fund annual project applications.
Project leaders of ongoing (not approved for completion before August 2, 2024) national or provincial social science fund projects are not eligible to apply for new projects.
Application Process:
Apply online through http://xmsb.jschina.com.cn. Detailed steps, please refer to attached Manual for Applicants.
Registered applicants can log in using their account and password. New applicants must first register and have their account activated by their institution’s research management department before they can submit an application.
More application details, please visit: 2024年江苏省社科基金年度项目申报公告
Language: Chinese
Internal Deadline: 4:00 pm, Monday, July 29, 2024
If you are interested in applying for this funding opportunity, please send your proposals to research-support@dukekunshan.edu.cn by the internal deadline. Please notice that you shall register an account first before submitting your final application through http://xmsb.jschina.com.cn.
See attachment 1
See attachment 2
See attachment 3
See attachment 4
